raw_transcript: It suggests the virus has entered an 'active' phase. Even if your liver enzymes are only slightly elevated, a rising viral load increases the long-term risk of cirrhosis and liver cancer. I’m going to order a liver ultrasound today to screen for any nodules.
final_corrected_note: It suggests the virus has entered an 'active' phase. Even if your liver enzymes are only slightly elevated, a rising viral load increases the long-term risk of cirrhosis and liver cancer. I’m going to order a liver ultrasound today to screen for any nodules.
